questions.text: In which of the following states is terrace cultivation practised?
questions.explanation: Terrace cultivation is practiced in hilly areas like Uttarakhand to prevent soil erosion and facilitate farming on slopes.

questions.text: Which one of the following is the main cause of land degradation in Punjab?
questions.explanation: In Punjab, Haryana, and Western Uttar Pradesh, over irrigation is responsible for land degradation due to waterlogging which increases salinity.

questions.text: Black soil is also known as:
questions.explanation: Black soil is ideal for growing cotton and is also known as regur soil. It is typical of the Deccan trap region.

questions.text: Where was the first International Earth Summit held in 1992?
questions.explanation: The first International Earth Summit was held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, to address urgent problems of environmental protection and socio-economic development.

questions.text: Resources which are surveyed and their quality and quantity have been determined for utilization are:
questions.explanation: Developed resources are those whose availability and quality have been assessed for immediate use using available technology.
